name: Counseller
description: Conversational AI counselor for Indian engineering college admissions. Captures JEE/CET/BITSAT/VITEEE/KCET/AP-EAMCET/WBJEE scores and recommends colleges based on 2023-2024 cutoffs.

slash_commands.name: add-exam
slash_commands.description: Add an exam attempt. Args: JSON {exam_name, year, marks|rank|percentile (at least one), category}

slash_commands.name: set-preferences
slash_commands.description: Set/update preferences. Args: JSON partial {preferred_branches?, preferred_locations?, max_fees_lakhs?, tier_preference_max?, home_state?}

slash_commands.name: recommend
slash_commands.description: Compute top college recommendations based on stored exams and preferences.

slash_commands.name: list-exams
slash_commands.description: List all stored exam attempts for this chat.

slash_commands.name: clear
slash_commands.description: Delete all stored exams and preferences for this chat (start over).
